_comment: Golden corpus — representative inputs across the audio taxonomy. eval/run.py runs each through the PRODUCTION cog and scores the output with eval/metrics.py + the validators.py watchdog. No cog version reaches prod unless this is green. RULE (learned the hard way 2026-06-13): a SOURCE must be REAL, original audio (a speech, a movie scene, an instrumental) where voice and music are separable. NEVER use a previously-generated RoarBliss output as a source — its voice and music are already glued and demucs cannot un-mix them, which produces a fake 'volume rollercoaster' that is bad TEST DATA, not a pipeline bug. This file GROWS: every real failure becomes a permanent entry.

entries.note: User uploads an INSTRUMENTAL + picks a library voice (permanent GoT-Jon EL id) + new script. NO separation -> the bed IS the untouched original; it cannot wobble. The Suno-template flow. FOUNDER-APPROVED.
entries.audio: /Users/clarence/Downloads/Game of Thrones - King of the North  Season 1 (1).mp3

input.name: Clarence Johnson
input.prompt: Clarence Johnson is building his AI agency Rebelz AI and grinding to find clients. Remind him to never give up, every no brings the yes closer. His mother has heart problems and he carries that worry. He stays calm and strong for his child. Tone: Jon Snow energy - quiet steel, honor, the North remembers.

entries.note: Multi-voice cinematic source — keep ITS own orchestra, clone EACH voice consistently, replace 75%. FOUNDER-APPROVED (the golden bar).
